generation.sourceCode:
import { Card, Stack, Row, Text, Box, Divider } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives';

interface ForecastDay {
  day: string;
  icon: string;
  highTemp: string;
  lowTemp: string;
}

interface Props {
  location?: string;
  currentTemperature: string;
  condition: string;
  conditionIcon: string;
  humidity: string;
  windSpeed: string;
  forecast: ForecastDay[];
  temperatureUnit?: string;
}

export default function GeneratedComponent({
  location = 'Current Location',
  currentTemperature,
  condition,
  conditionIcon,
  humidity,
  windSpeed,
  forecast,
  temperatureUnit = '°',
}: Props) {
  return (
    <Card
      padding="var(--ggui-spacing-6, 24px)"
      shadow="md"
      border
    >
      <Stack gap={16}>
        <Stack gap={4}>
          <Text
            variant="caption"
            color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)"
          >
            {location}
          </Text>
          <Row align="end" gap={8}>
            <Text
              variant="h1"
              color="var(--ggui-color-primary-700, #0369a1)"
              weight="bold"
            >
              {currentTemperature}{temperatureUnit}
            </Text>
            <Row align="center" gap={4}>
              <Text variant="h3" aria-hidden>
                {conditionIcon}
              </Text>
              <Text
                variant="body"
                color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-700, #374151)"
                weight="medium"
              >
                {condition}
              </Text>
            </Row>
          </Row>
        </Stack>

        <Row gap={16} wrap>
          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-primary-50, #f0f9ff)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
          >
            <Stack gap={4}>
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-primary-700, #0369a1)">
                Humidity
              </Text>
              <Text variant="h3" color="var(--ggui-color-primary-900, #0c4a6e)">
                {humidity}
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>

          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-primary-50, #f0f9ff)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
          >
            <Stack gap={4}>
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-primary-700, #0369a1)">
                Wind
              </Text>
              <Text variant="h3" color="var(--ggui-color-primary-900, #0c4a6e)">
                {windSpeed}
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>
        </Row>

        <Divider margin={4} />

        <Stack gap={8}>
          <Text
            variant="label"
            color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-700, #374151)"
            weight="semibold"
          >
            5-Day Forecast
          </Text>
          <Row gap={8} wrap>
            {forecast.map((day) => (
              <Box
                key={day.day}
                padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
                background="var(--ggui-color-neutral-50, #f9fafb)"
                borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
              >
                <Stack gap={4} align="center">
                  <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)">
                    {day.day}
                  </Text>
                  <Text variant="body" aria-hidden>
                    {day.icon}
                  </Text>
                  <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-900, #111827)">
                    {day.highTemp}/{day.lowTemp}
                  </Text>
                </Stack>
              </Box>
            ))}
          </Row>
        </Stack>
      </Stack>
    </Card>
  );
}
